title: Kenya payroll month-end checklist (printable, M-Pesa-aware, statutory-parallel)
excerpt: A printable Kenya payroll month-end checklist for SMEs — pre-cutoff data hygiene, attendance lock, gross-to-net, maker–checker approval, M-Pesa disbursement, three-way reconciliation, statutory remittance prep, accounting close, audit retention. Co-brandable for accountants and HR consultants.
meta_title: Kenya payroll month-end checklist — printable SME guide (2026)
meta_description: A printable Kenya payroll month-end checklist: data hygiene, attendance lock, M-Pesa run, three-way reconciliation, statutory remittance, accounting close, retention.
